chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 2383 of 2017 Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 15983/17 3.For orders on CMA 15984/17 4.For hearing of Main Case. Before: Mr. Justice Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi Date of Hearing: 24-02-2022 Date of Decision: 24-02-2022 None present on behalf of the Petitioner. O R D E R Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar, J. – Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner is seeking his employment in Respondents Department on the basis of plot donation. None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation is received; whereas, record reflects that this Petition is pending since 2017, but no efforts have been made to even get the notices issued; whereas, the controversy involved in this Petition has also been decided by the Hon’ble Supreme Court vide Order dated 09.11.2015, passed in Civil Appeals No.19-K to 50-K of 2015 (Government of Sindh and others v. Loung Khan Rajper and others), wherein it has been held that such appointments cannot be allowed on plot donation basis. In view of such position, instant Petition being misconceived and not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
